events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. The scenario describes voltage-rated rubber insulating gloves that are either the wrong class for the system voltage or past their required periodic electrical retest — both void the gloves' shock protection rating. Marked as **fail / high risk**, with corrective actions to quarantine the gloves, verify/retest per ASTM F496, and reissue correctly classed PPE per NFPA 70E Table 130.7(C)(7)(1) before energized work continues.
